title: Welcome to UGC, New Delhi, India
text_content: Welcome to UGC, New Delhi, India Follow Us on Twitter Like Us on Facebook Follow Us on LinkedIn Follow Us on Instagram Subscribe on YouYube Follow Us on WhatsApp group Skip to main content Skip to Navigation Screen Reader Text Size: A - A A + Hindi Contact Us FAQs e-Procurement Tenders Jobs Toggle search Alert: Students/Parents can verify the authenticity of Higher Educational Institutions (HEIs) before taking admission (Please check under Main Menu Tab (HEIs)) | Invitation of applications from eligible colleges for Deemed to be University status, may apply on the portal at https://deemed.ugc.ac.in/ | Invitation of applications from eligible colleges for conferment/extension of Autonomous status, colleges may apply on the portal at https://aucollege.ugc.ac.in About University Grants Commission The University Grants Commission (UGC) came into existence on 28th December, 1953 and became a statutory Organization of the Government of India by an Act of Parliament in 1956, for the coordination,determination and maintenance of standards of teaching, examination and research in university education. Read More Message from Chairperson UGC The University Grants Commission (UGC) was established by an Act of Parliament in 1956 to coordinate, determine, and maintain standards of teaching, examination, and research in university education. Now, UGC has become an important pillar of higher education. h4:
Alert: Students/Parents can verify the authenticity of Higher Educational Institutions (HEIs) before taking admission (Please check under Main Menu Tab (HEIs))  | 
 Invitation of applications from eligible colleges for Deemed to be University status, may apply on the portal at https://deemed.ugc.ac.in/  | 
Invitation of applications from eligible colleges for conferment/extension of Autonomous status, colleges may apply on the portal at https://aucollege.ugc.ac.in
